failures.description: The agent misread or ignored the ProductCatalogSearch result and produced an answer saying there were no matching items, despite the tool returning one matching item.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The relevant tool output at step 3 clearly returned count=1 with one available Jigsaw Puzzle matching difficulty level beginner and price greater than 45.76: item_id 1096508426 priced at 46.13. At step 4, the Executor synthesized the answer as 'No items match that filter above the given price,' which directly contradicts the tool result. This is not an invalid tool invocation, unsupported intent, underspecification, or guardrail/system issue; the tool call succeeded and returned sufficient evidence.
